resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def lastSubstring(self, s: str) -> str:
        n = len(s)
        max_substr = ""
        for i in range(n):
            for j in range(i + 1, n + 1):
                substr = s[i:j]
                if substr > max_substr:
                    max_substr = substr
        return max_substr
```
efficiency: LOW
time complexity: O(n^3)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: MEDIUM
explanation: This solution uses a brute-force approach to generate all possible substrings and compare them to find the lexicographically maximum substring.
